Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service And Dismiss Action
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SONIA TRUDEAU'S Motion To Quash Service And Dismiss Action. Defendant's motion to quash and dismiss action is granted. The case is dismissed with prejudice. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR # 6576 =302/hk

Motion To Set Aside Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Defendant'S Motion; Declaration Of Defendant Sonia Trudeau; Proposed Order

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SONIA TRUDEAU'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)
